description: Multi-turn Goa friends trip flow ending in confirmation -> extraction.

turns: We want to go to Goa.
From Mumbai, 4 nights from {today+21d} to {today+25d}. 4 friends.
Sightseeing and some nightlife, budget around Rs 12000 per night for the group, so Rs 48000 total excluding flights.
No dietary preferences, beach-facing hotel would be great, nothing to avoid.
Yes, that summary is correct, please extract and proceed.
